title: GraphConceptPatch
description: Body schema for PATCH /concepts/:urn. URN comes from the URL, not the body. `data` is a partial object merged into the existing concept's data. Envelope-level `type` is hard-rejected.

data.description: Partial fields to merge into existing concept data. `type` MAY appear here only if it equals the existing data.type — but the route enforces that semantically; the schema does not require type on PATCH (most patches are partial updates of other fields).
